name: update_vault
description: Replace the vaulted payment card with new credentials. REQUIRES SUPERVISOR TIER 3. This is a high-privilege operation: after this call, all future approved transactions will use the new card. Only available when the human operator explicitly enabled Tier 3 during 'agentledger init'. Use with extreme caution.

card_number.description: Card number (digits only, no spaces or dashes).

expiry_date.description: Card expiry date in MM/YY format.

country.description: Two-letter country code (e.g. US, GB, DE).
